diffs.diff:
--- a/explore5.py
+++ b/explore5.py
@@ -0,0 +1,40 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env python3

+"""Explore Pi0 processor format - understand exact batch structure."""

+import os

+import sys

+import numpy as np

+import torch

+import inspect

+

+os.environ['HF_HUB_OFFLINE'] = '1'

+

+print("=== Loading Pi0 ===")

+from lerobot.policies.pi0 import PI0Policy

+from lerobot.policies.pi0.processor_pi0 import make_pi0_pre_post_processors

+

+device = torch.device('cuda' if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'cpu')

+print(f"Device: {device}")

+

+policy = PI0Policy.from_pretrained('lerobot/pi0_base')

+policy = policy.to(device)

+policy.eval()

+print("Policy loaded")

+

+# Look at the processor source

+print("\n=== Processor module source ===")

+import lerobot.policies.pi0.processor_pi0 as proc_module

+src = inspect.getsource(proc_module)

+print(src[:8000])

+

+print("\n=== Pi0Policy.select_action source ===")

+src2 = inspect.getsource(policy.select_action)

+print(src2)

+

+print("\n=== Pi0Policy.predict_action_chunk source ===")

+try:

+    src3 = inspect.getsource(policy.predict_action_chunk)

+    print(src3)

+except:

+    print("No predict_action_chunk method")

+

+print("\nDone!")
